sentences.text: 'If it is, I will listen because I really like fiction,' he added.
'It relates to you,' answered the Linnet, and he flew down to the riverbank to tell the story.
'Once upon a time,' began the Linnet, 'there was an honest little fellow named Hans.'
'Was he very special or famous?' asked the Water-rat.
